auth.subtitleSignUp: Create your account to get started

signup.freeHint: Free to start — no payment details required.

errors.noGoogleToken: No ID token received from Google.

errors.saveFailed: Could not save your profile. Please try again.
errors.birthDateRequired: Please select your date of birth

errors.heightInvalid: Please enter a height between 100 and 250 cm
errors.weightInvalid: Please enter a weight between 30 and 300 kg

sex.title: What's your biological sex?
sex.subtitle: This helps us calculate your calorie needs more accurately. You can skip this step.

birthDate.title: When were you born?
birthDate.subtitle: We use your age to personalize your calorie goal.
birthDate.expoGoWarning: The date picker requires a development build. Run npx expo run:ios instead of Expo Go.

activity.title: How active are you?
activity.subtitle: Choose the option that best describes your typical day.

goal.title: What's your goal?
goal.subtitle: We'll calculate a daily calorie target based on your goal.
goal.faster_weight_lossWarning: A faster deficit can be harder to sustain. Consider consulting a professional if unsure.

summary.title: Your daily target
summary.subtitle: You can adjust your calorie goal before saving.
summary.minimumApplied: Your calculated target would be {{calculated}} kcal. For safety, we set a minimum of {{minimum}} kcal.
summary.farFromTdeeWarning: This target differs significantly from your estimated needs and may be unhealthy long term.

weight.label: Current weight
weight.modalSubtitle: Today's entry replaces any earlier weight logged today.
weight.updateTargetDescription: Your goal weight for tracking progress.
weight.saveFailed: Could not save your weight. Please try again.

meals.title: Today's meals

meal.deleteMealConfirm: Delete this meal permanently? This cannot be undone.

mealItemRow.pcsUnavailableMessage: The piece weight for this product is not known.

manualEntry.title: Log meal manually
manualEntry.saveError: Could not save your meal. Please try again.
manualEntry.validationFixRows: Complete all product fields before saving.

mealEdit.title: Edit meal
mealEdit.saveError: Could not save your changes. Please try again.
mealEdit.loadError: Could not load this meal. Please try again.

gallery.permissionBody: Allow photo library access to import a meal photo from your gallery.

camera.permissionBody: Allow camera access to photograph your meal.
camera.captureFailed: Could not take the photo, please try again

scan.referenceObjectHint: Tip: place a fork or your hand next to the food – it helps estimate size.
scan.referenceObjectHintMultiPhoto: For even more accuracy: take 2–3 photos from different angles.

confirmation.title: Confirm your meal
confirmation.validationNoIngredients: Add at least one ingredient to save.
confirmation.validationFixRows: Complete or remove highlighted ingredients before saving.
confirmation.analyzeError: The meal photos could not be analyzed. Please try again.
confirmation.saveError: Could not save your meal. Please try again.

rateLimit.title: Scan limit reached
rateLimit.message: You've reached your daily scan limit (20 scans). Try again after {{resetAt}}.
rateLimit.messageNoReset: You've reached your daily scan limit (20 scans). Please try again tomorrow.

errors.parseMessage: Could not recognize anything in the photo. Try again or enter manually?

barcode.loadingSlow: This is taking longer than expected...
barcode.timeoutMessage: Try again with the barcode inside the frame, or cancel to go back.
barcode.notFoundMessage: This barcode is not in the Open Food Facts database. You can scan your meal with a photo instead.
barcode.nutrimentsMissingMessage: No nutrition values are listed for this product.
barcode.saveError: Could not save your meal. Please try again.
barcode.fetchError: The product could not be loaded. Please try again.

settings.comingSoonMessage: Calorie goal settings will be available here soon.

weight.empty: No weight data yet — update your weight on the home screen.

calories.empty: No calorie data yet — scan meals to start tracking.

security.manageInProfile: Manage password and sign-out in Profile

cloud.connectedDescription: Your data is syncing securely with Kolibi Cloud.
cloud.disconnectedDescription: We could not verify a secure cloud connection. Try refreshing.

privacy.title: Your data stays private
privacy.description: Only you have access to your health data. Kolibi does not sell your personal information.

dataRights.description: Under GDPR you can request access to, export, or deletion of your personal data at any time.

support.intro: Tell us what happened or what you need — we read every message.
support.messagePlaceholder: Tell us what's on your mind...
support.messageRequired: Please enter a message before sending.
support.sentMessage: Thanks for reaching out. We'll get back to you as soon as we can.

errors.title: Something went wrong
errors.loadFailed: Could not load your settings. Please try again.

profile.avatarMessage: Choose how you want to update your profile photo.
profile.avatarPermissionDenied: Permission is required to update your profile photo.
profile.avatarUploadFailed: Could not upload your profile photo. Please try again.
profile.nameSaveFailed: Could not save your name. Please try again.

password.allFieldsRequired: Please fill in all password fields.
password.tooShort: The new password must be at least 6 characters.
password.mismatch: The new passwords do not match.
password.changeFailed: Could not change your password. Please check your current password.
password.successMessage: Your password has been changed successfully.

health.disconnectedHint: When you connect, your activity level is replaced by your actual Health data. Your base goal will be lower, but calories you burn are added throughout the day.
health.connectedHint: Your onboarding activity level is no longer used. Your daily goal is based on your basal metabolic rate plus the calories Apple Health shows you actually burn.
health.revokeHint: To fully revoke access, open the Health app and go to Sharing → Apps.
health.connectConfirmMessage: Your daily goal will now be calculated from your basal metabolic rate and your real Health data. It may change as a result.
health.disconnectHint: If you disconnect, your daily goal will be reset to your onboarding activity level.
health.disconnectConfirmMessage: Your daily goal will be recalculated using your onboarding activity level instead of Apple Health data. It may change as a result.
health.saveFailed: Could not update your Health connection. Please try again.

calorieGoal.completeOnboardingFirst: Please complete your profile in onboarding review first.
calorieGoal.saveFailed: Could not save your calorie goal. Please try again.

subscription.cancelHint: Required under §312k BGB — cancels via your Apple ID subscription settings.
subscription.withdrawHint: Required under §356a BGB since 19 Jun 2026 — details in our terms of service.
subscription.withdrawPlaceholder: The withdrawal process will be available here once billing is connected.

signOut.title: Sign out?
signOut.message: You can sign back in at any time.

deleteAccount.step1Message: This will permanently remove your profile, goals, and personal data from Kolibi.
deleteAccount.step2Message: All of your data will be permanently deleted. Are you absolutely sure?
deleteAccount.failed: Could not delete your account. Please try again or contact support.

paywall.title: Your trial has ended
paywall.description: Photo scan, barcode lookup, and meal tracking — all in Kolibi Premium.
paywall.autoRenew: Renews automatically each month until you cancel. Cancel anytime.
paywall.purchaseSuccessMessage: You now have full access to Kolibi.
paywall.purchaseError: Purchase could not be completed. Please try again.
paywall.priceUnavailable: Subscription price is not available right now. Please try again later.
paywall.restoreEmpty: No active subscription found for this account.
paywall.restoreError: Could not restore purchases. Please try again.
